_note: Staged archive-tab + auto-number labels for the three planning list pages (PO / TO / WO) + the PO/TO create modals. en/pl carry real values per the two-locale rule; the parent merge lane folds these under Planning.{purchaseOrders,transferOrders,workOrders} in apps/web/i18n/{en,pl,ro,uk}.json (ro/uk mirror the en value). Threaded into the pages defensively via t.has so an un-merged bundle never throws.

list.archivedHint: Showing archived purchase orders (received / cancelled past the org's archive window).
